Title: Add a new vehicle manually
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Add Vehicle" option.
3. Select "Insert vehicle manually/doors."
4. Enter all required vehicle details manually.
5. Click on "Search vehicle in dataset."
6. Confirm that the vehicle is not found in the dataset.
7. Proceed to select and add the vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The vehicle is successfully added to the system.
- Confirmation message is displayed indicating the vehicle was added.

Title: Search for existing vehicle in dataset
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Data: - Existing vehicle details (make, model, year, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Add Vehicle" option.
3. Select "Insert vehicle manually/doors."
4. Enter all required vehicle details manually.
5. Click on "Search vehicle in dataset."
6. Confirm that the vehicle is found in the dataset.
7. Proceed to select and add the vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The existing vehicle is selected from the dataset.
- Confirmation message is displayed indicating the vehicle was added.

Title: Add vehicle using invalid data
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Data: - Invalid vehicle details (missing fields, incorrect format, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Add Vehicle" option.
3. Select "Insert vehicle manually/doors."
4. Enter invalid vehicle details.
5. Click on "Search vehicle in dataset."
6. Confirm that the vehicle cannot be added due to invalid data.
Expected Result:
- Error messages are displayed for each invalid field.
- The vehicle is not added to the system.

Title: Successful user registration
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to register a new user.
3. Provide valid user credentials.
4. Confirm that the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result:
- User is registered successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed indicating successful registration.

Title: Unsuccessful user registration
Test Data: - Invalid user credentials (missing fields, incorrect format, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to register a new user.
3. Provide invalid user credentials.
4. Confirm that the user registration fails.
Expected Result:
- Error messages are displayed for each invalid field.
- User is not registered.

Title: Access and modify settings
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Settings" page.
3. View current settings.
4. Modify the list of vowels.
5. Save changes.
6. Navigate to the "Statistics" page.
Expected Result:
- Settings page is accessed and displayed correctly.
- Modifications to the list of vowels are saved.
- Statistics page is accessed without issues.

Title: Access settings with invalid modifications
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Data: - Invalid list of vowels (non-alphabetic characters, duplicates, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Settings" page.
3. View current settings.
4. Attempt to modify the list of vowels with invalid data.
5. Confirm that the modifications fail.
Expected Result:
- Error messages are displayed for each invalid modification.
- Settings page remains unchanged.
- Statistics page is accessed without issues.

Title: Access settings and statistics without modifications
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the "Settings" page.
3. View current settings.
4. Do not make any modifications.
5. Navigate to the "Statistics" page.
Expected Result:
- Settings page is accessed and displayed correctly.
- No modifications are applied.
- Statistics page is accessed without issues.

Title: Access settings and statistics with repeated actions
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Settings" page.
3. View current settings.
4. Modify the list of vowels.
5. Save changes.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 multiple times.
7. Navigate to the "Statistics" page.
Expected Result:
- Settings page is accessed and displayed correctly each time.
- Modifications to the list of vowels are saved each time.
- Statistics page is accessed without issues after each modification.

Title: Access settings and statistics with invalid navigation
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the "Settings" page.
3. Attempt to navigate directly to the "Statistics" page without viewing settings.
4. Confirm that the navigation is blocked.
5. Navigate to the "Settings" page again.
6. View current settings.
7. Attempt to navigate directly to the "Statistics" page again.
8. Confirm that the navigation is blocked.
Expected Result:
- Navigation to the "Statistics" page is blocked until settings are viewed.
- Settings page is accessed and displayed correctly.
- Statistics page is accessed without issues after viewing settings.
